work_experience_normalized.position: Assistant Technical Officer - Planning, Logistics and Material
work_experience_normalized.description: Liaise with various departments to coordinate the requirements for internal and external support. Review engineering orders and work instructions for material requirement. Plan scheduled maintenance and man-hours, spares, tools & equipment. Ensure AOG requisitions are actioned on priority and PO is released. Assisted in lease return, C-checks, engine changes of aircraft A320 and ATR 72-600. Review service bulletins and monitor compliance in fleet in-house. Higher check planning, material requisitions and procurement initiating. Update aircraft technical log data in AMOS, GRN actions and QC tasks. Assisted in regulatory audits, QC audits, scope enhancement audits and safety audits.

work_experience_normalized.position: Production Planning, Quality Assurance and Safety
work_experience_normalized.description: Preparation of hangar visit plan for maintenance check. Assisted in man hour planning. Updating proposed work load daily. Preparation and updating of forecasting chart of expendables and components. Preparation of daily work packages.
